packs.name: Filling Kernels (q^25)
packs.description: Dehn filling kernels for 54 coprime slopes with |P| ≤ 10, Q ≤ 5, at q-order 50.

packs.name: Filling Kernels (q^50)
packs.description: High-order filling kernels for ~100 coprime slopes with |P|,|Q| ≤ 10, at q-order 100.

packs.name: Census I^ref (q^10)
packs.description: Pre-computed refined index for SnapPy orientable cusped census manifolds at q-order 20.

packs.name: Census I^ref (q^25)
packs.description: Pre-computed refined index for SnapPy orientable cusped census manifolds at q-order 50.
